title: ferray-core: no repeat/tile equivalents
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's np.repeat(arr, repeats, axis) and np.tile(arr, reps) are in numpy._core.fromnumeric. repeat duplicates elements along an axis; tile repeats the entire array. These are commonly used for data preparation (expanding label arrays, creating batch dimensions, etc.). ferray-core has no equivalents. broadcast_to() handles some tile-like cases but not repeat (which changes shape without stride tricks).
